name: Ida-Viru (Estonia)
description: The flag of Ida-Viru County, a heraldic banner displaying the county's coat of arms.
history: Ida-Viru (Estonian: Ida-Virumaa) is one of Estonia's 15 counties; the modern flag is the banner of the county's coat of arms.

features.symbolism: banner of the coat of arms of Ida-Viru County
